name: codex-notify
description: Useful notifications when a Codex turn finishes.

interface.shortDescription: Useful notifications for completed Codex turns.
interface.longDescription: Runs a Codex lifecycle hook at turn completion and sends notifications that help you decide whether to return now or later. Notifications can include status, prompt/result summaries, verification signals, repository metadata, PR links, and local history. The first release candidate ships with a Pushover delivery provider and a setup helper for local Pushover credentials.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Notify to set up Pushover credentials on this Mac.
Use Codex Notify to test my notification hook.
Use Codex Notify to explain recent notification logs.
